scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const src=p.join(__dirname,'frontend','dist');const dst=p.join(__dirname,'backend','public');if(fs.existsSync(dst)){fs.rmSync(dst,{recursive:true})}fs.cpSync(src,dst,{recursive:true});console.log('Frontend copied to backend/public')"
